mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_job(id, form_id, owner_id, status) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{formId}, #{ownerId}, 'QUEUED')
mapper.update: UPDATE export_job SET status = 'RUNNING' WHERE id = #{jobId}
UPDATE export_job SET status = 'DONE', storage_key = #{storageKey}, file_name = #{fileName}, finished_at = now() WHERE id = #{jobId}
UPDATE export_job SET status = 'FAILED', error = #{error}, finished_at = now() WHERE id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "jobId", form_id AS "formId", owner_id AS "ownerId", status AS "status", storage_key AS "storageKey", file_name AS "fileName", error AS "error", to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt", to_char(finished_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "finishedAt" FROM export_job WHERE id = #{jobId} AND form_id = #{formId}
